flaggedZones.instruction: Add participial connective phrases (', Ving') through the Cyndia-report exchange to join the short-sentence chain, then trim one or two coordinating-clause joins so the zone gains connective tissue without pushing compound density higher.

textureFindings.priorityInstruction: Participial density is 6.5% against a 12.0% target—add ', Ving' connective phrases in every flagged zone first, then trim excess compound and semicolon-heavy constructions that are now above ceiling.
